claims.evidence_text: Apply 11 – 22 kg S/ha (10 – 20 lbs S/ac) depending on soil fertility and observed S deficiency in previous seasons.
claims.claim_summary: Recommended sulfur application for wheat is 11-22 kg S/ha (10-20 lb S/ac) depending on soil fertility.

claims.evidence_text: Apply S fertilizer at seeding or top dress before Feekes 5 (Zadoks 30) growth stage. Available nutrients should be near crop roots during uptake periods.
claims.claim_summary: Apply sulfur fertilizer at seeding or top-dress before Feekes 5 / Zadoks 30 (start of stem elongation).
